title: Practo Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Practo Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Practo Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
